# Founders KSA — Complete Content for AI Agents

> Your gateway to entrepreneurship in Saudi Arabia. Real founder stories, startup resources, and ecosystem insights for building in the Kingdom.

## How to Read Full Articles

This website is a single-page application (SPA). If you cannot render JavaScript, use our plain-text API to read full article content:

- **All articles index:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article
- **Specific article:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug={slug}

Replace `{slug}` with the article slug (e.g., `hassan-ikram`, `njd-studio`, `treehouse`).

---

## About Founders KSA

Founders KSA was born from a simple frustration: finding clear, reliable information about starting a business in Saudi Arabia was unnecessarily difficult. Government portals, scattered blog posts, and word-of-mouth advice left aspiring entrepreneurs confused and overwhelmed.

We set out to change that. By compiling comprehensive licensing guides, documenting the startup ecosystem, and sharing authentic founder stories, we created a single destination for anyone looking to build in the Kingdom.

Whether you're a Saudi national exploring your first freelancer license, an international founder considering the KSA market, or simply curious about the vibrant startup scene — Founders KSA is here to guide you every step of the way.

### Mission
To empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the knowledge, resources, and inspiration they need to build successful businesses in Saudi Arabia.

### Vision
A thriving Saudi entrepreneurial ecosystem where every founder has access to clear guidance and a supportive community.

### Values
Transparency, accessibility, and authenticity. We believe real stories and practical guides make the difference.

---

## Saudi Startup Ecosystem Highlights

- **SAR 6B+** in Gaming & Entertainment Investment — Saudi Arabia is the largest gaming market in MENA
- **2,000+ Active Startups** — A rapidly growing ecosystem backed by Vision 2030
- **5 Startup Hub Cities** — Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, NEOM, and more

---

## Founder Stories

### 1. From Teenage Coder to 5 Million Downloads — Salman, NJD Studio (Gaming)
**URL:** https://foundersksa.com/stories/njd-studio
**Full text API:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=njd-studio

Salman started coding games as a teenager in Saudi Arabia, turning a bedroom hobby into NJD Studio — a gaming company with over 5 million downloads. His journey highlights the explosive growth of the Saudi gaming industry, supported by Vision 2030's investment in entertainment and digital content.

### 2. From the Janitor's Closet to the Boardroom — Sir Alain Edene, Fittin International (Healthcare)
**URL:** https://foundersksa.com/stories/alain-edene
**Full text API:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=alain-edene

Sir Alain Edene's journey from humble beginnings to founding Fittin International in Saudi Arabia is a story of resilience and determination in the healthcare industry. His company now serves the Kingdom's growing health and wellness market.

### 3. Rooted in Resilience: Riyadh's Farm-to-Table Café — Lulwah Al Juraiban, Treehouse (F&B / Hospitality)
**URL:** https://foundersksa.com/stories/treehouse
**Full text API:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=treehouse

Lulwah Al Juraiban built Treehouse, a farm-to-table café in Riyadh, combining sustainability with Saudi Arabia's booming food and beverage industry. Her story showcases female entrepreneurship in the Kingdom.

### 4. The Architect of Startups in Saudi Arabia — Hassan Ikram, Cotyledon (Consultancy)
**URL:** https://foundersksa.com/stories/hassan-ikram
**Full text API:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=hassan-ikram

Hassan Ikram founded Cotyledon, a startup consultancy helping new businesses navigate the Saudi market. His mantra: "Hard work eventually pays off — just don't give up on the drive."

### 5. From Banking to Biotech — Faisal Shaker (Biotech)
**URL:** https://foundersksa.com/stories/faisal-shaker
**Full text API:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=faisal-shaker

Faisal Shaker transitioned from 15 years in banking to founding a biotech venture in Saudi Arabia, raising SAR 5M in under an hour. His story demonstrates the Kingdom's growing appetite for deep-tech innovation.

### 6. The Science of Possibility — Dr. Hayat Sindi (Healthcare/Biotech)
**URL:** https://foundersksa.com/stories/dr-hayat-sindi
**Full text API:** https://hjxmcovyutuvbbvytjkm.supabase.co/functions/v1/read-article?slug=dr-hayat-sindi

Dr. Hayat Sindi is one of Saudi Arabia's most celebrated scientists and entrepreneurs, known for her groundbreaking work in biotechnology and her efforts to make science accessible in the Arab world.

---

## Founder Quotes

- "Hard work eventually pays off — just don't give up on the drive." — Hassan Ikram, Cotyledon
- "Success is never owned, it is rented. And rent is due every day." — Sir Alain Edene, Fittin International
- "Build for the player, and the success will follow." — Salman, NJD Studio
